vision.visual_reason: Modern hotel room with exposed concrete ceiling, large floor-to-ceiling windows showing city skyline, unmade bed, wall mural of 'Puente de la Mujer' bridge, and balcony seating area visible.
Close-up of multiple plated dishes (salad, pie, pasta, sides) on a wooden table dominates the frame; no clear view of the venue space or interior atmosphere.

Close-up of two plates of food (pappardelle pasta and a salad with fries) on a wooden table; a person's torso/arm is visible but no identifiable face; the image focuses on the dishes rather than the venue space.
Interior space with large floor-to-ceiling windows and balcony doors, sheer curtains, a small bistro table and chairs, bed corner visible, and an open city/trees view providing strong natural light.

Close-up of a plated meal with steak, broccoli, carrots, and cauliflower on a white plate, with a beverage can and glass partially visible; the food product dominates the frame with no meaningful depiction of the venue space.
Close-up of two hands holding Aperol Spritz-style cocktails on a wooden bar/counter with a heavily blurred dark background; drinks and hands dominate the frame with no clear view of the venue space.

Dimly lit restaurant interior featuring green-tiled tables set with wine glasses, tumblers, cutlery, and a small table lamp providing warm focal lighting; leather chairs and additional set tables visible in the background near large windows.
Dimly lit interior of a wine bar with tables, chairs, glassware, pendant lights, and a large wine bottle display shelf, creating a dark, intimate atmosphere.

Close-up of a glass surface with a stylized 'ADONDE' logo and decorative emblem etched/frosted on it; the background shows a blurred, dark interior with warm bokeh from bottles on shelves, but the logo dominates the frame and the space is not clearly shown.

Dimly lit bar interior with focus on green velvet bar stools, red tile bar front, and a blurred bartender in background. The shallow depth of field and out-of-focus background make it more of an atmospheric detail shot than a clear hero image of the space.
Dimly lit image of wooden shelves stocked with various liquor and wine bottles, too dark and product-focused to serve as a hero interior, though it conveys a warm, intimate bar atmosphere.

Dimly lit restaurant interior with dark green wood paneling, leather banquettes, wood table set with wine glasses and plated food, and floral arrangements visible in a framed mirror—conveying a moody, intimate dining atmosphere.

Close-up overhead view of a latte with art, a plate of scrambled eggs, avocado, tomatoes, and bread on a wooden table. No spatial or architectural venue context visible; focus is entirely on food and drink.

Clear interior view of a cafe with exposed concrete walls, glass block window, terracotta-colored counter, espresso machine, and visible seating with patrons. Industrial-rustic aesthetic with warm lighting and decorative wall art.
Close-up top-down view of a grain/nut bowl with arranged strawberries, bananas, kiwi, and peanut butter on a wooden table. No spatial or venue context visible.
Well-lit hotel room interior showing bed, seating area, desk, TV, and window with curtains, conveying a warm, upscale atmosphere.

Spacious multi-level hotel lobby with polished marble floors, patterned sofas, leather armchairs, glass coffee tables, sculptural centerpieces, warm ambient lighting, and a visible bar/lounge area in the background. No people present, sharp focus, rich textures.
Indoor pool with glass ceiling, floor-to-ceiling windows showing city view, modern wall art, lounge chairs, and abundant natural light creating a bright, airy atmosphere.
Luxurious hotel lobby with polished marble floors, tufted sofas, modern seating, classical paintings, and a concierge desk with two staff members.
Well-lit hotel bedroom with upholstered bed, nightstands, desk, framed art, and accent wallpaper; clear interior composition.

Elegant private dining room with a long table set for a meal, flanked by upholstered chairs, warm wood paneling, two table lamps, and a still-life painting, conveying a refined and intimate atmosphere.
Symmetrical conference/ballroom interior with rows of chairs, projection screen, ornate crystal chandeliers, warm lighting, and patterned carpet.

Outdoor patio/courtyard dining area with multiple set tables, white linens, red-cushioned chairs, topiary dividers, patio heaters, and a manicured lawn garden. Clear guest seating and experience space visible.
Dark wood-paneled dining room with a dramatic chandelier, wine cabinets, and a stone table styled with bread, wine, and flowers, conveying an upscale intimate atmosphere.
Close-up of plated steak, salad, fries, and wine glasses on a white tablecloth; food and drink dominate the frame with no broader venue space visible.

Image is dominated by a wine glass, wine bottle, water bottle, and cork in the foreground. Background showing tables and chairs is heavily blurred and out of focus, making the product the clear subject.
Close-up of two crepes/galletes on white plates with wine glasses, candle, and hands at the top edge; food dominates the frame with minimal venue context.
Close-up of a powdered crepe on a black plate, with partial wine glasses and papers visible; food product dominates the frame, venue space not shown.
Close-up of fried food patties with lemon wedges, bread basket, and fried items in sauce on plates; no venue space or atmosphere visible.
Close-up of two crepes dusted with powdered sugar on a white plate, with a small dessert plate visible in the background. No venue interior or space is visible; only plated food items.

Close-up of a dark, intimate lounge/bar setting with a glowing mushroom-style table lamp, two cocktails on a glossy black table, red leather banquette, and a lattice/trellis partition, all under low warm lighting.
Close-up of two skewered food items on a fish-shaped plate with sauce, Tabasco bottle and glassware in background; food dominates the frame with only a sliver of dark wooden table visible.

Top-down view of a table filled with food (breaded cutlets, pasta, a dish in sauce), cocktails, and water glasses, with only hands and partial arms visible; food and drink dominate the frame with no clear view of the venue's space.
Close-up of bacon-wrapped cheese skewers with red sauce and chives on a speckled plate, with a small bowl in the background. Food dominates the frame; no venue space is visible.
Close-up of fried food, plantain chips, and dipping sauces with drinks; tabletop-only composition with no visible space or atmosphere.
Close-up of a plated dish with carrots, white fish/cheese, onions, and edible flowers on a decorative plate. Only food and plate edge visible, no venue space.
Close-up of coffee, dessert slices, and meringue on plates dominating the frame, with only a partial torso and dark table surface visible.

Close-up of a large platter of grilled meat (steaks and ribs) on a metal tray atop a wooden surface, with a blurred person in a chef's coat in the background. Focus is entirely on the food product rather than the venue space.
Close-up of grilled meat, sausages, and lemon wedges on a metal platter with a plaid tablecloth visible at the edge; no venue interior or exterior space is shown.
Close-up product shot of a single Trumpeter Malbec wine bottle on a wooden surface with a dark, blurred, smoky background. No venue space, people, or architectural features are visible.
Close-up of a fried egg with double yolk atop a pile of french fries on a metal tray; food product shot with no venue space visible.
Stained glass window depicting a tower with 'LA GIRALDA' and '1930' text, mounted on a plain wall. Decorative detail, not a spatial view.

Close-up of a speckled ceramic bowl containing pasta (appears to be gnocchetti or similar) topped with grated cheese, on a wooden table with water glasses and a plate of bread visible at the edges. Food and tableware dominate; no broader venue space is shown.
Close-up of a plated risotto dish with shrimp on a white plate; food and plate fill the frame, with no visible dining space, seating, or room atmosphere.
Dimly lit restaurant interior with leather banquette seating, bistro tables, table lamps, framed art, and draped curtains, conveying a moody, intimate dining atmosphere.
